UHA-51  EXAMINATION OF HIGH ALLOY STEEL WELDS. (a) Welds in high alloy steel vessels shall be examined by radiographic or ultrasonic methods in accordance with UW-11 and UW-51. (b) Liquid penetrant examination shall be performed on all accessible surfaces of pressure-retaining welds. (c) The extent of examination shall be as specified in this paragraph based on the joint category per UW-3 and the service conditions per UW-2. For spot examination, see UW-52. Welders performing examined welds shall be qualified per QW-301. Acceptance criteria shall be as specified in UW-51. For examination documentation, refer to UG-93.
